programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Spooky Sensation
programme.desc: The girls decided to spend a weekend at the hotel. It appears to be haunted. Watch the full video to know more about this.

programme.title: Sings of Love
programme.desc: See how Stephanie and Olivia enter the Under the Sea photo competition. Jacob wrote a love song! Olivia and her friends are very excited to hear. Tanya and Stephanie are teamed up in baking class. Watch the video for more fun.

programme.title: Video Wonder
programme.desc: Olivia and Andrea visited science camp with Mrs Stevens. On the other hand, Andrea and Mia decides to return a lost skunk to nature. Andrea was reading intimate postcards between Chef Pierre and Mrs. Stevens.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Public Enemy Number One
programme.desc: The Ninja must find out as much as they can about Nadakhan before he finds the Realm Crystal to save his crew, but after the Ninja are labeled enemies by the world they used to protect, our heroes find themselves hunted by their old friend, Ronan. With the Destiny's Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn. Misako accidentally reveals the location of the Realm Crystal. The ninja discover that Wu was researching djinn when he disappeared and split up to learn more about their potential new foe. Lloyd and Zane head to the Library of Domu. While there, Ronin hacks into Zane's systems and shuts him down, then captures Lloyd. Ronin uses Zane's SOS beacon to lure Kai and Nya into the desert, where they are captured. Later, Cole and Jay are defeated by Ronin as well. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has used his powers to foil the high-tech security guarding the Realm Crystal and steals it. The ninja are hauled off to Kryptarium Prison and Nadakhan is free to gather his lost crew.

programme.title: Enkrypted
programme.desc: Falsely imprisoned, the Ninja are at their lowest point, but find an unlikely friend in an old enemy. Meanwhile, Nadakhan rescues his marooned crew and gains a new perspective, along with a new mysterious plan. With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny's Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot. Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan's ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja break him out of jail. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has decided to return to his home realm of Djinjago, only to discover it is falling apart. The ninja's destruction of the Cursed Realm is affecting the realms connected to it. Nadakhan uses the Djinn Blade to smash the Teapot, absorbing all the spirits that were trapped there into the sword.

programme.title: Misfortune Rising
programme.desc: The ninja's search for Nadakhan's ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan's crew is struggling to handle an airship which used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya. Jay wishes that he wasn't born in a junkyard and was rich. The next moment, he receives a letter saying his father has died and he has inherited his estate. Jay rushes home to find his parents in the junkyard and finds out they are fine, but they reveal that he is adopted. Jay discovers that his real father is the actor who played his favorite movie hero. In an effort to trap the ninja, the Sky Pirates start raids all over NINJAGO City. Nadakhan kidnaps Kai, who makes two wishes, both of which go wrong. His third wish is to “make it all go away.” Nadakhan's first mate, Flintlocke, accidentally destroys the Realm Crystal and Cole steals Soto's map. The Destiny's Bounty mysteriously vanishes from the police impound yard. The Ninja are on a collision course to find the map to stop Nadakhan, they first must find him. Meanwhile, Jay makes a wish to change his future, but it could alter his past indefinitely.

programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Robin is at his workshop at the Knights' Academy doing an “independent study” – he's working on some top secret project for Merlok 2.0. It all seems excellent! We even see the Knights new vehicles – which have been optimized for civilian life (except for Clay's.) But storm clouds are brewing. Well, one storm cloud is brewing: the Cloud of Monstrox! Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. He follows his old buddy Jestro as he goes across the realm on the weekends apologizing for being evil. ZAP! With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Weekend At Halberts
programme.desc: Party time in Knighton! The mood is down so the King decides to throw a party. In the meantime Jestro attacks the Fortrex, but he is confronted with the new NEXO Power "The Wedgie of Doom". Clay is turned to stone and everyone is gloomy. Especially King Halbert. In order to get everything in a better mood Aaron organizes a celebration. The King wants a reenactment of Clay's heroic rescue of the Queen. He is (as usual) totally unaware of Clay's situation. In order not to disappoint him further, the Knights get a remote control for Clay's Battle suit and is thus able to “perform” as Clay. Lance is happy to exercise his acting abilities and quickly gets into the role of the uptight knight of knights. Ava is working on reinstalling Merlok 2.0 into the Fortrex with Robin. She is also preparing the Fortrex for a visit from the new Knights' Academy novices. It is a fieldtrip with Principal Brickland and Sir Griffiths with the goal of teaching the kids about these new so-called High-tech battle strategies. Not really feeling it for anything modern, it quickly turns into a regular trip back memory lane for Brickland and Sir Griffiths. This out of control excursion is an excellent moment for Jestro who is looking for an opportunity to cheer up the defeated Monstrox. Unfortunately, for Jestro, Ava is able to make Merlok 2.0 functional again, and the Novices are able to fight Jestro and his monsters off using the NEXO Power: Wedgie of Doom. It is a humiliating defeat. Apparently, this is just what the doctor ordered for Monstrox. A good laugh at someone else's expense. His evil mood is back on.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream's fate is revealed as the Quintessons judge Cybertronians.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Prowl, Bumblebee and Sari head into the forest to find the source of mysterious Cybertronian energy readings.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream, Lugnut and Blitzwing begin their invasion of Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Now that Megatron's body is rebuilt, he leads the Decepticons in his search for the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and his band of Autobots are taken off the job.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Confident of his ability to finally overcome the Autobots, Megatron challenges Optimus to battle.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron's plan to split up the Autobot team and defeat them individually.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons lose another battle: Megatron takes out his frustration on Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When Cheetor messes up an important mission, he decides to fix it on his own.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Maximals try to place a Predacon detection system during an Energon storm.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Primal is abducted by an otherwordly probe, leaving the Maximals leaderless.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Terrorsaur discovers a floating mountain, rich with the mineral Energon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A stasis pod, containing the spark-soul of a robot, lands on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Dinobot accuses Rattrap of working with the Predacons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car.

programme.title: Smurf On The Run
programme.desc: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfs That Time Forgot: Being kind to animals brings unforeseen results for the Smurfs when they decide to bring a baby dinosaur back home... in its own era! This is the start of a series that spans space and time.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Swapping Smurfs: In trying to avoid doing his chores, Lazy Smurf finds an old abandoned well with an interesting peculiarity: anything that goes down in the bucket comes back up in its original brand-new condition. But is it good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Viking: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's Marvelous Toy: It's been a few hundred years since Grandpa Smurf has seen this old toy… It was given to Papa Smurf long, long ago and he does not remember what it does. But Baby Smurf does know that it brings surprises for everyone!

programme.title: He Who Smurfs Last
programme.desc: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.

programme.title: Jokey's Medecine
programme.desc: Because of Jokey's pranks, none of the Smurfs believe him when he tells them that Azrael the cat is ready to pounce on them. Feeling guilty and responsible, he hurries to Gargamel's castle and plays some explosive jokes on the wizard and his cat so he can free his friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Royal Drum: No one believes Grandpa Smurf when he tells of far-away jungles and savannahs teeming with wild giant cats, striped horses, long-necked leaf-eaters and strange tribes... Only some Smurflings give some credit to his tales. But when Grandpa Smurf hears the sound of the magic Royal Drum in the forest, the one that can tame wild beasts, he sets out to prove that he's not an old addle-brained storyteller.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I: What, or who, is that strange being in the forest? It looks vaguely like a Smurf, but it chatters away like the squirrel that seems to be accompanying it… And why is Papa Smurf talking about the Lost Smurfling?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Snappy's Puppet: Snappy has a new trick: he frightens everybody, or tries to, with his hand-puppet dragon. But it gets, shall we say, out of hand when Papa Smurf's magic liquid falls on the puppet and it comes alive. Alive and kicking, what's more, endangering Snappy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby Smurf Is Missing: Thinking Baby Smurf is a leprechaun, two poachers kidnap him and try to get the small one to tell them where his pot of gold is hidden. Papa Smurf organizes everyone to attack the villains with Smurfberry pies so Baby can escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfing Out Of Time: None of the Smurfs seem to have time to play with the Smurflings. They go on a visit to Father Time and come across the River of Time, the great current that flows along majestically, carrying with it all the time in the world. And then an accident occurs, with untimely consequences...

programme.title: Tailor's Magic Needle
programme.desc: Tailor Smurf has to make an outfit for every Smurf before the Fall fashion show. Brainy Smurf wants to help him and, using Papa Smurf's book of Magic, he conjures up a magic needle that sews ten times faster than tailor... But is it really any good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Memory Melon: Selwyn and Tallulah are two powerful married wizards. The trouble is, they fight all the time. But the energy from their arguments is brewing up a dreadful storm and Papa has to get them to make up before the storm starts to rage.

programme.title: S1 Bwah‑ginnings
programme.desc: The Rabbids unleash their very first wave of chaos, kicking off nonstop mischief.

programme.title: S1 Summer Bwah‑cation
programme.desc: Sun, sand and total silliness as Rabbids turn summer into pure mayhe

programme.title: S1 Tech‑Tastrophe Rabbids
programme.desc: Gadgets glitch, machines revolt and Rabbids make every device go BWAH.

programme.title: S1 Lab Test Bwah‑nanza
programme.desc: Experiments explode into chaos as Rabbids turn science into slapstick.

programme.title: S1 Bwah‑Beats
programme.desc: Music, noise and DJ disasters collide in a rhythm‑fuelled Rabbid mess.

programme.title: S1 Critter Chaos
programme.desc: Animals, fleas and farmyard madness spark wild Rabbid antics.

programme.title: S1 Supernatural Bwah‑ventures
programme.desc: Aliens, hypnosis and spooky surprises send Rabbids into weird territory.

programme.title: Berry Naughty
programme.desc: Oh, what a ripe, sweet, and beautifully-smelling raspberry! Masha has gone picking berries, but Bear had strictly forbidden it. Now she'll do anything to avoid admitting that she disobeyed him. The situation goes too far, and everyone in the forest gets involved in the debacle. So what will the strict Bear do?

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Seven Young Kids
programme.desc: This educative tale teaches us that caution should never be dismissed. Mother-Goat goes to pick up cabbage, leaving her seven kids alone at home. Hungry Wolf tries to get into the house imitating mother Goat's voice to fool the little yeanlings. He manages to deceive six kids, but the seventh, the smallest one, manages to hide in the oven. The Wolf tries to get into the house through the chimney, but here comes Mother-Goat and finds her seventh kid. She melts the stove, and the Wolf rushes into the forest with his tail burnt. The other six kids come back home and finally the family reunites.

programme.title: The Fox and the Rolling Pin
programme.desc: This is the story about the Fox, the Cat and the Rooster. The sneaky Fox wanted to fool the Cat in order to eat the Rooster and get a rolling-pin. No matter how the Fox tried to butter up the Cat, he denied hand over the Rooster to the Fox. To teach her a lesson, the Cat got into a bag himself and when the Fox opened it in order to eat the Rooster, the Cat jumped out of it and frightened her. The point of the story is that “if you are well off you don't seek better”.

programme.title: Go I Know Not Whither
programme.desc: One day he wished to taste an exotic fowl and sent Yegor the huntsman to the deep forest. In the forest, Yegor met a starling, which turned into a beautiful girl. The Tsar saw Yegor to have successfully completed his task and also got the beautiful wife. He started to envy Yegor. The Tsar decided to send Yegor over distant seas to bring do not know what. Despite Tsar's insidious plan, Yegor has successfully returned back home and even taught the king an important lesson not to envy other people.Once upon a time there was a king. He was very cranky and foolish.

programme.title: The Frog Princess
programme.desc: There lived a Tsar with his three sons. The oldest son married on nobleman's daughter, the second one married the merchant's daughter, while the youngest son - on the Frog. She was not pretty, but happened to be the Frog Princess who turned into a beautiful girl. This story teaches us to take care of your pets. This is the only way they could appeal to your concerns and become your faithful friends.

programme.title: Liar, Liar, Pants On Fire
programme.desc: Kids love daydreaming and show off their imaginary successes, aren't they?! Masha and Panda grip into a real cheating competition! This would be very funny story If only all the secrets were not revealed all at the most inopportune time!

programme.title: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard, but yet he has no idea that soon he would have to pull Masha from a puddle and a jar of jam. But it's not all- now the Bear has to sew new dresses eve-ry time when Masha will get wet or dirty.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: Masha wants some sweets but first she has to transform the Bear's kitchen into a candy-making factory. As we all know, such sweet life means trouble and soon Masha gets a toothache. There is a lesson for all children who love sweets - take very good care of your teeth!

programme.title: Princess or Dragon?
programme.desc: A snow tower? Check. A group of friends? Check. Sound like a recipe for a fun game! Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie and Penguin – what wouldn't you do for the sake of the children! But who will be the Princess? And who will be the Dragon? And the knight and his brave steed? Masha has her own opinion on these questions…

programme.title: Well-beeing
programme.desc: What happens when bees overeat chocolates? Masha becomes their personal trainer! Get ready! Let's start weight loss exercises!

programme.title: How to Train Your Plant
programme.desc: She-Bear is going to a resort and leaves Bear with her “pet” – a flycatcher. The modest flower suddenly shows an excellent appetite. Masha, of course, knows better than anyone how to treat the flycatcher. She-Bear will be surprised when she returns to the forest and sees what came out of such a “feeding”!

programme.title: Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: The Bear plays checkers. Masha interrupts him asking to feed her. The Bear cooks some porridge for her. But Masha doesn't like it. The Bear goes off in a huff. Masha decides to cook porridge her-self. But soon the porridge swells out. All the for-est inhabitants will remember this day for long…

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: When you're with your best friends, adventure is right around the corner! This time Masha and her faithful companions go on an amazing journey for pirate treasures. What awaits the brave travelers on the road ahead?

programme.title: The Mystery Guest
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there! Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help the baby, and, of course, Masha tags along with him. Although if we are to face danger, then we must do so together!

programme.title: Quartet Plus
programme.desc: To play in a quartet is not so easy as it seems, especially if there is no slack between musicians. This is what Masha tells Papa Bear, who came to visit. And he will tell about Bear's childhood and how he was mischievous with the Himalayan bear. Has anything changed since then? We will learn it from the new episode. And most importantly, music will unite everyone!

programme.title: Swept Away
programme.desc: Masha and the Hare are having an epic game of hockey. When the game is at its peak, Masha goes off to find the missing puck and stumbles upon a broom. Now this is much better than a hockey stick and Masha gets an idea. But it turns out the broom can be used for things other than hockey.

programme.title: When Life Gives You Lemons
programme.desc: The Bear has a plan to save the sweltering She-Bear> He's planned a date and made refreshing homemade lemonade from his own grown lemons. But as usual, Masha bursts into the plan. Treat the whole forest with lemonade - that's the best idea! Quiet date - that's not great! Hello lemonade fever!

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Masha is the best "mommy" in the world, but even she can not put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: a music box. And everything would have been fine, but the music box suddenly turns out to hold a surprise inside it!

programme.title: Arts and Crafts Day
programme.desc: Masha announces Arts and Crafts Day. Get your glue, pencils and any unnecessary things and let's create! The Bear is trying to sneak away on a fishing trip. But what will he catch if all his floats are gone for crafts? Is it Masha, to put her in a corner? Well, not this time. Friendship always wins in our creative contests!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Grim Testament About One Snotty Boy
programme.desc: Have you ever heard that the world around is full terrible plagues and diseases? One boy called Semushka knows it for sure! Wherever he threw a glance – he seemed to see tetanus, rubella and other kinds of chickenpoxes…The poor boy was so terrified that began to squish his nose even harder. The only saving measures was an aid kit which his grandmother has put in his backpack “just in case” and a little spacesuit…Basically…this grim “testament” about such a snotty boy came out to be the most educative one!

programme.title: A Myth Full Of Grief And Despair About One Historical Error
programme.desc: Here is a boy called Arkasha who really doesn't like history lessons. The most frightening thing for him was…a history test. He tried his best to prepare for the test, however he fell asleep. When he opened his eyes he saw all the range of historic characters chastising him for his illiteracy, and Napoleon was even ready to hit him on the head with a globe! Arkasha was so scared that vowed to learn all the names and dates, otherwise how could he protect himself from such nervous historic creatures?!Do you know what children are scared the most of at school? What makes them tremble?!

programme.title: Panic Unbearable Legend About Insects
programme.desc: Once there was a girl called Anya who was very scared of insects! One day Anya's mother asked her to help around the house but in everything she did, Anya was haunted by spiders and all kinds of midges! She was on the edge of despair when her little brother proved to her, that little crumbs can't be of any danger to giants like children!

programme.title: Happy New Year… Again!
programme.desc: Masha decides celebrating New Year once is not enough and goes to mysterious China, where dragons dance, gardens bloom and many, many more interesting things are happening!

programme.title: Like Cat And Mouse
programme.desc: Alert! Bear's fridge is in danger! Someone has burst into his house to stay for life…but the Bear is ready for everything to defend his stocks! He calls for a savior, but in reality it turns to be a new intriguing story full of unexpected discoveries which leads Masha to some peculiar conclusions!

programme.title: At Your Service
programme.desc: The technologies some time can teach us a human lesson like in this story about two robots. One of them was presented to Masha for her birthday and the other one was made by the Bear to help him around, but tried to become the boss. Everything turned into great mess and only an unexpectedly awakened feeling between two robots put everything in its place.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: Bon Appétit
programme.desc: Panda- the Bear's distant relative pays one more visit to the Bear. They start making Chinese dump-lings, but then Masha appears, with her own methods of cooking. And a simple cooking turns into a culinary master class with butterflies!

programme.title: Once In A Year
programme.desc: The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.

programme.title: Prances With Wolves
programme.desc: The Wolves that live in the forest come with a plan to kidnap Masha and demand the Bear to pay a ransom. However the Bear is pleased to find Masha gone and he does not rush the events. Meanwhile Masha turns the Wolves' lives into a hell and they end up paying the ransom to the Bear just to get rid of her once and for all.

programme.title: Around the world in one day
programme.desc: The Bear is preparing to go on a world trip, but a last minute accident makes him panic. In the meantime, Masha knows the best way to prepare for the trip and shares it with the Bear.

programme.title: Princess and the Beast
programme.desc: Shocking and sensation! For the first time in our forest! A couple of tourists broke into the Bear's house without an invitation in search of impressions and cool photos. And there they are - just a sleepy Bear and Masha, who really wants to play. Rejoice tourists! You will have impressions, photos, and obstacle course from here and to the city itself!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: Masha is again playing mother and daughter with Rosie. But this time an honest lot distributed the roles. Now it's Masha's turn to put on her cap and get in the stroller. Will Rosie endure mother's everyday life?

programme.title: Terrible Power
programme.desc: The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon. Get ready to learn a lesson that everything should be done with a sense of proportion, especially when it comes to beauty.

programme.title: All the world's a stage
programme.desc: The best remedy for boredom is a good game. And a good play is even better. That is exactly what our friends decided. It's just not so easy to agree on what kind of play to stage..

programme.title: The Tops and the Roots
programme.desc: There was a village and a man, living in this village. In a deep forest near that village, the Bear settled in. The Bear asked the man for some tasty treats. The man gave the Bear two options of what he prefers to eat: the tops or the roots. The Bear decided to take the tops. The man grew a turnip and gave the tops to the Bear. The tops were tasteless. The Bear asked the man to try the turnip. The man agreed on the condition that the Bear will help him with the housework and keep off the flies. While chasing away the flies, the Bear accidentally hit the man on the nose. The Bear was scared and ran away into the forest, grabbing the turnip with him. Since then, people use to say “to be a fool for one's pains”.

programme.title: Ali Baba
programme.desc: This story is about one very kind, but very poor Ali-Baba and his rich but greedy brother Kasym. Once upon a time Ali-Baba overheard the magic spell, which opens up the magic cape with numerous treasures. These treasures were stolen by the thieves and kept in this cave. One day Ali-Baba met Kasym and told him the secret spell. Kasym got inside the cape, but accidentally forgot the spell and the thieves caught him. They forced Kasym to learn the whole book of fairy tales by heart and spend one thousand days and a thousand and one nights telling these stories to them. This story teaches us to study well and avoid cheating.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.

programme.title: Tom Thumb
programme.desc: This is a story about the small but brave boy. The moral of the story is that no matter how big and tall you are, you should not offend the little ones. It may happen so that you will meet some tom thumb boy, who will beat any “giant”.

programme.title: Wee Little Havroshechka
programme.desc: There lived a woman who had three daughters - two of her own and the stepdaughter called Wee Little Havroshechka. She loved her own daughters and hated the stepdaughter who was forced to work till dawn. No matter how hard she tried to please the stepmother, she was unapproachable. Once upon a time the stepmother kicked her out of the house, but every medal has its flipside – Wee Little Havroshechka met her Prince and they lived happily ever after, and it's all because she was hard-working and clean.

programme.title: Quartet Plus
programme.desc: To play in a quartet is not so easy as it seems, especially if there is no slack between musicians. This is what Masha tells Papa Bear, who came to visit. And he will tell about Bear's childhood and how he was mischievous with the Himalayan bear. Has anything changed since then? We will learn it from the new episode. And most importantly, music will unite everyone!

programme.title: Tour de Forest
programme.desc: Himalayan Bear is once again competing with Bear! This time they have arranged a bike race, but something doesn't smell right: Himalayan Bear intends on cheating to win! Good thing Masha stands as a guardian of justice and always comes to a friend's aid!

programme.desc: Deadly Cuts follows the stylists of a Dublin hair salon who become accidental vigilantes as they take on a local gang threatening their community.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is based on the novel by Johanna Spyri. The film follows the adventures of Heidi, a young orphan girl, whose gift for happiness helps her when she is forced to leave the mountains for a new life in the city.

programme.title: The Little Alien
programme.desc: When a little alien named Britney crashes her spaceship on planet Earth, 11-year-old Allan enlists the help of his UFO-obsessed neighbour. Together they must hatch a plan to get Britney back to outer space before it's too late.

programme.title: The Nutcracker
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Mary lives in a home filled with lovely things and loneliness. Bothered by bratty brother Max and neglected by well intentioned, but distracted, parents, she yearns for companionship. On Christmas Eve, Mary's Uncle Albert arrives with the gift of a wooden nutcracker doll…

programme.title: Maya the Bee: The Golden Orb
programme.desc: When a bored Maya and Willi bust out of winter lockdown early, they are catapulted headfirst into a top secret mission! Entrusted with the care of a sacred seed, Maya and Willi team up with their old pal's Arnie and Barnie to deliver the seed to its new home atop the mysterious Bonsai Mountain.

programme.title: The Little Vampire
programme.desc: From the screenwriters of Chicken Run and The Addams Family, comes The Little Vampire: a fantastic adventure that you can really sink your teeth into!

programme.title: American Heist
programme.desc: (2014) Action thriller with Hayden Christensen and Adrien Brody. After serving time for a crime they both committed, one brother threatens to drag the other back into criminality.

programme.title: The Pledge
programme.desc: (2008) Western with Luke Perry, C. Thomas Howell and Kim Coates. After killing an innocent man, an ex-lawman on a quest for revenge makes a pledge that takes him straight into the path of his prey.

programme.title: Escape Plan 3
programme.desc: (2019) Action sequel with Sylvester Stallone. Ray Breslin is back behind bars in a Latvian cell-ebration of chaos - because rescuing billionaires' daughters is just part of his daily breakout routine.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: (1971) Western starring Charles Bronson and Ursula Andress. When a priceless golden sword is stolen, a rugged bodyguard and a samurai warrior join forces to take down the bandits.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: (1963) Western starring John Wayne, Maureen O'Hara and Patrick Wayne. A wealthy rancher must navigate warring factions in the Wild West while also fighting to save his troubled marriage.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate
programme.desc: Johnny Depp unlocks the gates of hell in the tense thriller directed by Roman Polanski. After a rare-book dealer (Depp) is hired to locate the last copies of a demonic manuscript, he's swept into a web of theft, murder, and terrifying satanic rituals.

programme.title: God's Own Country
programme.desc: Johnny Saxby (Josh O'Connor) works long hours on his family's remote farm in the north of England. He numbs the daily frustration of his lonely existence with nightly binge-drinking at the local pub and casual sex.

programme.title: The Dreamers
programme.desc: The tumultuous political landscape of Paris in 1968 is the backdrop as three young cineastes are drawn together through their passion for film.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A man who dumps his long-time girlfriend discovers his ex is a superhero, and she's out for revenge.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 3
programme.desc: Sheriff Dan Tashtego joins forces with a group of monster hunters and ropes in officer Davis Tubbs to help stop the creature from its feeding spree.

programme.title: All I See Is You
programme.desc: Gina (Blake Lively: The Shallows) and husband James (Jason Clarke: Everest) have an almost perfect marriage. After being blinded as a child in a nearly fatal car crash, Gina exclusively depends on James to feel and ‘see' the world around her, and it appears only to solidify their extremely passionate relationship. While the two enjoy a colourful existence living in Bangkok, their relationship is upended when Gina receives a corneal transplant and regains her sight. With her restored vision, Gina experiences the world with a new sense of wonder and independence which James finds threatening. It is only when Gina suddenly begins to lose her sight again that she finally realises the disturbing reality of their marriage... All I See Is You is directed by Hollywood heavyweight Marc Forster (World War Z, Quantum of Solace), and also stars Danny Huston (American Horror Story, Wonder Woman).

programme.title: Memoirs of an Invisible Man
programme.desc: After a freak accident, a company executive turns completely invisible, goes on the run, and becomes hunted by a treacherous CIA official while trying to cope with his new reality.

programme.title: Zulu (1964)
programme.desc: Outnumbered British soldiers do battle with Zulu warriors at Rorke's Drift.

programme.title: Match Point
programme.desc: At a turning point in his life, a former tennis pro falls for an actress who happens to be dating his friend and soon-to-be brother-in-law.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: No Way Out
programme.desc: A morally upright naval hero accepts a position with the Secretary of Defense and his somewhat overzealous assistant. Things become a bit sticky when the Secretary of Defense becomes involved in the murder of a beautiful Washington, D.C. party girl.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen stars as a sophisticated but bored tycoon who pulls off a bank heist so stunning that even Boston's finest are baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek insurance investigator out to bring him in but who, ultimately, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: A tough cop is dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers.

programme.title: Crank: High Voltage
programme.desc: In a chase through Los Angeles, Chev pursues a Chinese mobster who has stolen his nearly indestructible heart.

programme.title: Crank: High Voltage
programme.desc: In a chase through Los Angeles, Chev pursues a Chinese mobster who has stolen his nearly indestructible heart.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: A damaged ex-special forces soldier seizes an opportunity to assume another man's identity.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: A tough cop is dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave: Deja Vu
programme.desc: Finally, after 1978's I Spit On Your Grave shocked the world with its story of a beautiful career woman assaulted and left for dead, and her notorious revenge on those responsible, cinema's most lethal Lady Vengeance returns in the most anticipated sequel of all time. Reuniting star Camille Keaton and original director Meir Zarchi, I Spit On Your Grave: Deja Vu sends now successful writer Jennifer Hills hurtling back to where it all began - to face the wrath of the families of those she murdered. Kidnapped along with her daughter Christy, it's a tense game of hunt - or be hunted - against a ruthless gang of degenerates and their violently unhinged matriarch, Becky. Hailed as a feminist revenge masterpiece by some, and misunderstood as crude exploitation by others, revenge is about to come full circle in Deja Vu, the final chapter in cinema's most shocking cult franchise.

programme.title: The Monster
programme.desc: A mother and daughter must confront a terrifying monster when they break down on a deserted road.

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer transforms his body and takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter and has his revenge.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target. A young man (Chris Evans - Sunshine, Fantastic Four ) and a teenage girl with extraordinary gifts (Dakota Fanning - War of the Worlds) take on a clandestine agency in a battle they can win only if they change the future.

programme.title: Imperium
programme.desc: Daniel Radcliffe (Harry Potter) plays Nate, a young FBI agent who goes undercover to expose a radical white supremacy terrorist group. Under a new identity and immersed in a deeply unsettling, hate-filled world, Nate must control his own beliefs whilst identifying the threat and keeping his true motives a secret. Inspired by true events, this compelling story also stars Toni Collette (Hereditary).

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: From director of action blockbuster Lethal Weapon, Richard Donner. Personal demons put cop Jack (Bruce Willis - Die Hard) at rock bottom but he wasn't about to let a witness be murdered on his watch. When he's assigned to escort a petty criminal to testify before the grand jury, a violent turn of events means this down-and-out cop needs to pull it together as he is hunted across New York City.

programme.title: White Mountain
programme.desc: This jaw-dropping climbing, Free Solo-esque documentary is a harrowing story of friendship, bravery and tragedy in one of the harshest environments known to man. 6 years after their trip to Dhaulagiri in the Himalayas to reach the peak of the almost mythical and rarely-climbed white wall, a group of Argentine climbers return to get closure on a fellow climber who was never to be seen again.

programme.title: Level 16
programme.desc: A shocking dystopian thriller, mashing together the disturbing world of The Handmaid's Tale and Black Mirror to stunning effect. 16-year old Vivien is trapped in The Vestalis Academy, a prison-like boarding school. Reunited with Sophia who previously betrayed her, they embark on the horrifying truth behind their imprisonment. Soon running for their lives, they must save themselves or die.

programme.title: Rock-a-doodle
programme.desc: An iconic family favourite from legendary director Don Bluth and featuring the voice of Oscar Winner Christopher Plummer. A contemporary take on the classic fish-out-of-water story as a rooster, who is tricked in to leaving town to seek fame as an Elvis-style Las Vegas singer, teams up with a young boy and a group of barnyard animals on a magical journey to defeat the Grand Duke of Owls.

programme.title: Time Runners
programme.desc: Special Agent Sally Biggs has a secret, she can rewind time - whenever she wants. It's enough to make her a celebrity at the FBI and control almost everything in her life. But when her scientist husband disappears mysteriously, paranormal apparitions begin to surround her before she discovers the terrifying truth.

programme.title: A Very Country Wedding
programme.desc: (2019) Romance with Greyson Holt and Bea Santos. With a wedding on pause and groom on tour-can one couple's love stay in tune, or will distance turn their duet into a solo act?

programme.title: My Boss's Wedding
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a personal assistant plans her boss's wedding with the groom's handsome nephew.

programme.title: Sealed With A Kiss
programme.desc: (2015) Rom-com with Jesse Metcalfe. A country star heads home for his imminent nuptials but must face the music when he realises he has feelings for his childhood sweetheart.

programme.title: One Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: Cara and Ben head back to where their romance began for a small, intimate wedding. Starring Taylor Cole (2021)

programme.title: Romance and Cigarettes
programme.desc: A down-and-dirty' musical set in the world of working-class New York, tells a story of a husband's journey into infidelity and redemption.

programme.title: Very Good Girls
programme.desc: EXCLUSIVELY AVAILABLE ON DIGITAL PLATFORMS. Best friends Lily and Gerry make a pact to lose their virginity before leaving for college. But when they both fall for the same handsome artist and Lily starts seeing him in secret, a lifelong friendship is tested.

programme.title: Can You Keep A Secret?
programme.desc: On a return flight from a botched client meeting, Emma reveals all of her deepest secrets to a handsome stranger when her plane hits turbulence and she believes she is going to die. Emma thinks she will never see the guy again.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max and Page are a mother and daughter con team with a devious routine. Max targets wealthy men, lures them into marriage and then Page seduces them, leaving Max to discover their infidelity and reap the huge divorce settlements which tide them over until they target their next victim.

programme.title: Frankie and Johnny
programme.desc: Join Elvis Presley and Donna Douglas for a riverboat ride of rollicking musical entertainment in this charming and sassy comic hit about a gambler and his lady love.

programme.title: Before You Say I Do
programme.desc: George wants to marry Jane, but she swore off marriage after her first husband broke her heart. After wishing he had met Jane before she got married, George winds up ten years in the past.

programme.title: Accidentally Engaged
programme.desc: Famous actor Chas Hunter and aspiring actress Clarissa Byers agree to fake an engagement to improve both their reputations. However, playing pretend starts to feel all too real as the two start to fall for one another.

programme.title: Nicholas Nickleby (2002)
programme.desc: After Nicholas' father dies and leaves the family penniless, the Nickleby Family moves to London to stay with their Uncle Ralph. Ralph turns abusive and separates the family.

programme.title: Finding Grace
programme.desc: A troubled teenage girl is forced to provide community service in a retirement home. As she develops a friendship with one of the residents and becomes closer to her father, she discovers the power of family, hope and faith.

programme.title: A Royal Surprise
programme.desc: When Riley's boyfriend, Mandla, invites her to South Africa to meet his family, she is shocked to discover that he is a prince. The news puts Riley's trust in Mandla in jeopardy, and he must do what he can to win her love back.

programme.title: Blueprint To The Heart
programme.desc: An interior designer trying to save her home renovation show needs to apply her successful, upscale "fixer upper" home renovation strategy to her blue collar carpenter by making the sweet but disheveled guy her next fixer upper project.

programme.title: Eat, Drink And Be Married
programme.desc: Three days from their wedding, Jess and Max are about to call it off. However, Jess starts to question her decision when Max's brother enlists the help of Billie to save the wedding, and in the process starts to fall for her.

programme.title: Quest For Love
programme.desc: Mackenzie travels to Costa Rica for work. Her best friend Ethan comes along to get romantic inspiration for his action /adventure novel. Mackenzie has loved Ethan for a long time, but he only sees her as a friend--until a tourist named Lucas makes Ethan see Mackenzie in a new light.

programme.title: Jackie / Todd / Stephanie
programme.desc: Hijackers take EgyptAir flight surfer attacked by shark mother assaulted.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A young student finds herself the hostage of a deranged criminal.

programme.title: Secrets in the Desert
programme.desc: Charlie and her boyfriend Aidan break down in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: Disappearance in Yellowstone
programme.desc: Her daughter has been kidnapped and the police think that Jessie is responsible.

programme.title: Jackie / Todd / Stephanie
programme.desc: Hijackers take EgyptAir flight surfer attacked by shark mother assaulted.

programme.title: Sweet Autumn
programme.desc: Maggie inherits half of her aunt's maple business and teams up with Dex to uncover the truth behind her will.

programme.title: Nash
programme.desc: This coming of age documentary chronicles the life of NBA All Star Steve Nash as he tries to navigate his way through the somewhat toils of professional sports while trying to leave a lasting legacy on and off the court.

programme.title: Sugar Baby Murder
programme.desc: A new executive assistant to a business tycoon learns that a life of luxury can come at a deadly price.

programme.title: All of My heart 2
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are preparing for the big opening of their bed and breakfast, Emily's Country Inn, when a huge storm hits Bucks County. Brian agrees to return to Wall Street to boost their funds, while Jenny scrambles to keep the opening on time.

programme.title: Killer Cover Up
programme.desc: Soccer star Jenna moves to a new town, but when she's framed for murder, she must uncover the real killer.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' comedy Paul Blart: Mall Cop, Kevin James stars as the title character, a single, suburban dad, trying to make ends meet as a security officer at a New Jersey mall. Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Holmes And Watson
programme.desc: A humorous take on Arthur Conan Doyle's classic mysteries featuring Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson.

programme.title: Gigli
programme.desc: When small time street thug Larry Gigli meets a tough and gorgeous enforcer named Ricki, the sparks fly in this outrageous battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Another You
programme.desc: ANOTHER YOU is the uproarious slapstick comedy about a pathological liar who, upon his release from a mental clinic, becomes involved with a con man and ends up impersonating a billionaire. Scam follows double-scam in classic Pryor/Wilder style. Features Academy Award winner Mercedes Ruehl as a con who falls for Gene Wilder.

programme.title: Halleluja and Sartana Strike Again
programme.desc: Two charming conmen—one posing as a missionary—set out to swindle a church group but end up clashing with a gang of greedy landgrabbers. In this slapstick western, the schemers unexpectedly turn into heroes as they help protect the townsfolk from losing everything.

programme.title: More Dead Than Alive
programme.desc: Released from prison after 18 years, notorious gunslinger 'Killer' Cain is a peaceful reformed man but the Old West has died and he cannot adapt to the modern West where some unpaid moral debts and old troubles resurface.

programme.title: Apache Fury
programme.desc: A judge encounters a man (Frank Latimore) he once wronged after an Apache attack. The attack forces him, his fiancée and their fellow stagecoach passengers to take refuge at a rest stop.

programme.title: Find a Place to Die
programme.desc: An outcast Confederate soldier redeems himself by defending a woman against bandits willing to kill for her goldmine claim.

programme.title: The Over the Hill Gang
programme.desc: A retired Texas Ranger and his three aging pals are hired to clean up a lawless town.

programme.title: San Demetrio London
programme.desc: This is a story of British pluck and humor based on a true-life adventure that thrilled the world.

programme.title: Captain Boycott
programme.desc: An Irish farmer and his neighbours fight eviction from their landlord.

programme.title: Chain of Events
programme.desc: John Clarke works in a bank and one day boards a bus on his way home, foolishly 'forgetting' to pay his fare.

programme.title: Henry V
programme.desc: The King is persuaded by those around him to claim the Crown of France.

programme.title: A Challenge for Robin Hood
programme.desc: After being falsely accused of murder, Sir Robin of Loxley takes refuge in the wilderness of Sherwood Forest.

programme.title: Streamer
programme.desc: As they each go live and explore the building, their chilling and spine-tingling experience is broadcast in real time...Five streamers gather at an abandoned building, determined to uncover the truth behind a bizarre video posted by a fellow streamer.

programme.title: Jeni, Juno
programme.desc: Thanks to one thoughtless blunder the young lovers are facing parenthood! Nevertheless, the adolescents decide to take responsibility for their lovechild. To protect it, the couple decides to keep the pregnancy a secret until the sixth month when an abortion would be impossible. Thus begins their project to protect their offspring. But Jenny's sister discovers their little secret!15-year-olds Jenny and Juno are immersed in the sweetness of puppy love, when one day Jenny discovers she is pregnant.

programme.title: Frankenstein Father
programme.desc: Young-jae, a teenager born from illegally sold sperm, goes to Chi-sung, a physician who had sold it when he was 20 years old. Young-jae demands a so-called ‘compensation for damages,' claiming Chi-sung is responsible for his defects. Although at odds with Young-jae, Chi-sung slowly feels a connection to him. Later, Young-jae's father Dong-suk appears and the three of them clash.

programme.title: Dancing with Ghosts
programme.desc: Yu-jin, who has lived as a virgin ghost, appears in the dream of Dong-jae, responsible for the lonely nights of lonely women. However, she soon appears in reality, asking for his help. The hilp she seeks is actually a request for one night together. Yu-jin, in order to go to the afterlife, needed love from Dong-jae. However, Dong-jae is reluctant to share his bed with her. In fact, she was the object of Dong'jae-s unrequited love, and he had been waiting to meet her in dreams and in reality. If he allows her into his bed, he fears losing her. Will they share the night together, or will they continue their precarious and eerie coexistence?

programme.title: Man Of Will
programme.desc: Charged with the murder of a Japanese person involved in Empress's assassination Kim Chang-Soo is imprisoned and grows to fight for Korean independence.

programme.title: Red Family
programme.desc: A group of North Korean spies disguised as an ordinary South Korean family work as spies in South Korea.

programme.title: Fourth Place
programme.desc: Junho a 11-year-old swimmer always records 4th place at all the swimming contests. His mom is more frustrated than himself in winning as she believes swimming is the only way for him to become successful. One day she manages to hire a personal coach who once was the most promising athlete on the national team. But he trains Junho the only way he knows how to use violence

programme.title: House Of The Disappeared
programme.desc: 25 years after imprisonment for murdering her son and husband, Mi-hee returns to the house that keeps its history. Priest Choi, the only person to trust Mi-hee, asks for truth, but she repeats that “they killed my husband and kidnapped my son.” After research, Priest Choi detects other missing persons cases which also occurred at Mi-hee's house.

programme.title: Alien Code
programme.desc: After deciphering a message found in a satellite, genius cryptographer Alex Jacobs finds himself being stalked by government agents and otherworldly beings.

programme.title: Origin Wars
programme.desc: CONTAINS FLASHING IMAGES: Set in the future in a time of interplanetary colonisation, Sy (Kellan Lutz), a mysterious drifter, meets Kane (Daniel MacPherson), a lieutenant working for an off-world military contractor – EXOR.

programme.title: Implanted
programme.desc: Sarah, a struggling young woman living in Brooklyn, agrees to volunteer as an experimental test subject for a company to be implanted with a nanochip in her cerebral cortex. When the implant turns sinister and orders her to commit crimes, Sarah has only one choice: to live or die.

programme.title: Trancers
programme.desc: A gruff bounty hunter travels back in time to 1980s Los Angeles to stop a twisted criminal who can transform people into zombie-like creatures.

programme.title: Cut Bank
programme.desc: (2014) Moody crime thriller with Liam Hemsworth, John Malkovich and Billy Bob Thornton. Could capturing a crime on camera be a couple's ticket out of Cut Bank? Escaping a small town can be murder...

programme.title: Mystery 101: Playing Dead
programme.desc: (2019) Mystery starring Jill Wagner. When a rising star receives a chilling death threat, a quick-thinking professor steps into the spotlight to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Secrets In The Snow
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller starring Aubrey Reynolds. Meeting the parents becomes more of an ordeal than normal when a woman is thrown into drama surrounding the death of a family member.

programme.title: Dispatch
programme.desc: (2016) Crime thriller with Fiona Gubelmann. A 911 operator takes a call from a child and dismisses it as a prank. But when a body is discovered, she'll do whatever it takes to make things right...

programme.title: Secrets That Kill
programme.desc: Jenny is unhappy when her mum Laura returns from a world cruise with a new younger husband.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: The Iceman is the story of real-life mob hitman Richard "The Iceman" Kuklinski, who was reportedly responsible for over 200 murders. .

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A young cop (Channing Tatum) is assigned to a precinct in the working class neighborhood where he grew up, where an old secret threatens to destroy his family.

programme.title: See for Me
programme.desc: See For Me is an original, edge-of-your-seat home invasion thriller with a killer twist.

programme.title: Find Me Guilty
programme.desc: The true story of mobster Jack DiNorscio and the longest mafia trial in US history. Charged with drug dealing, Jack decides to defend himself in court, despite having no legal experience. Can this New York wise guy convince a jury he's not the monster he's portrayed as?

programme.title: Emperors Bride
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Moose Bay, Alaska looking for the white jade sarcophagus of a Chinese Empress. Sydney runs into fellow relic hunters Dallas Carter and Kurt Reiner.

programme.title: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and rival relic hunter Kurt Reiner attempt to find the lost baseball glove of Jimmy Jonesboro.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Everyone who steals a statue that represents the Egyptian cat-goddess Mafdet is killed. Now, the statue has disappeared and Sidney and Nigel are tasked with retrieving it.

programme.title: The Book of Love
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Milan, Italy to search for Casanova's lost Book of Love.

programme.title: Myth of the Maze
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Claudia visit Athens, Greece to search the Minotaur's maze for the legendary golden twine.

programme.title: Afterlife and Death
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Cairo, Egypt and then Amsterdam. They must beat rival relic hunter Avery Ko to the Pharaoh Thutmose's diamond before it is cut up and sold.

programme.title: Etched in Stone
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Stewie Harper head to Stockholm, Sweden to find the Runestone of King Jann I of Norway.

programme.title: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Dublin, Ireland in search of the missing crown of the last King of Ireland.

programme.title: Passengers (2016)
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence and Chris Pratt star in an adventure about two passengers traveling to a new planet when their spaceship malfunctions.

programme.title: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: The fifth installment of the Underworld franchise.

programme.title: Wild Things II
programme.desc: Keeping your friends close and your enemies closer has never been more important...or more dangerous. The girls of Blue Bay are back, and they're wilder than ever in this seductive sequel where no one is innocent and nothing is what it appears to be.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Winner of 3 Academy Awards, WHIPLASH tells the story of an ambitious student drummer (Miles Teller) and his ruthless teacher (J.K. Simmons) who will stop at nothing to achieve perfection.

programme.title: Parked
programme.desc: After being refused welfare benefits and losing all hope of improving his situation, Fred lives a quiet, isolated life in his car. But everything changes when he forms an unlikely friendship with Cathal, a dope-smoking 21-year-old with a positive attitude, who becomes his ‘neighbour'.

programme.title: Giant Little Ones
programme.desc: Franky and Ballas have been best friends since childhood. They are high school royalty: handsome, stars of the swim team and popular with girls. They live a perfect teenage life – until the night of Franky's 17th birthday party, when they're involved in an incident that changes their lives forever.

programme.title: Black Bear
programme.desc: In search of solace at a remote lake house, a filmmaker pursues a new work of art through a calculated game of desire and jealousy.

programme.title: The sea of trees
programme.desc: Arthur Brennan treks into Aokigahara, known as The Sea of Trees, a mysterious dense forest at the base of Japan's Mount Fuji where people go to commit suicide.

programme.title: Wild Card
programme.desc: Nick Wild (Jason Statham) is a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal professional skills and a personal gambling problem. When a friend is beaten by a sadistic thug, Nick strikes back, only to find out the thug is the son of a powerful mob boss.

programme.title: Operation: Endgame
programme.desc: Two rival teams of assassins. One killer day at the office. An all-star cast including Rob Corddry, Ellen Barkin, Zach Galifianakis, Ving Rhames, and Jeffrey Tambor fight to the death to be the last man standing in this hilarious action comedy!

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: When Joe Braven, a humble logger residing along the U.S./Canada border, is confronted by a group of deadly drug runners in his secluded cabin in the mountains, he must do everything in his power to protect his family.

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun
programme.desc: JANE GOT A GUN is the story of Jane Hammond, a young mother living in a secluded ranch on the vast New Mexico prairie. When her family's life is threatened by a conniving gang of outlaws led by the nefarious John Bishop (McGregor).
